# copick config

*Create and manage copick configuration files.*

## Usage

```bash
copick config [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [`append-croissant`](append-croissant.md) | Append filtered rows from a copick project into an existing Croissant. |
| [`dataportal`](dataportal.md) | Set up a configuration file from CZDP dataset IDs. |
| [`export-croissant`](export-croissant.md) | Export a copick project to an mlcroissant manifest. |
| [`filesystem`](filesystem.md) | Set up a configuration file for a local project. |
| [`mlcroissant`](mlcroissant.md) | Set up a configuration file from an mlcroissant manifest. |
| [`set-splits`](set-splits.md) | Edit train/val/test split assignments on an existing Croissant. |
